name: amtech-agent-skills
description: Free, source-visible agent skills from AMTECH. The git repository is the install source; https://amtechai.com/skills/ is the materialized-view layer (human pages, manifests, hashes, archives) generated from these folders.

categories.agent-tool: Standalone tools any agent can run in-context from a single URL. Published and hashed at amtechai.com/skills.
categories.ai-employee: Operational skills that ship inside a deployed AMTECH AI Employee. These are templates: {{PLACEHOLDERS}} are filled at provisioning, and they assume a working directory with ./brain/ and ./output/.
categories.amtech-workflow: AMTECH content workflow skills shared for inspection and adaptation. These depend on files and conventions in the main AMTECH website repository.

skills.title: OKF Audit
skills.description: Audit an article, website, draft, sitemap, llms.txt, markdown bundle, or OKF bundle for AI-readable knowledge quality, entity coverage, citations, and materialized views. Returns a score, findings, and a remediation prompt.

skills.title: Knowledge Graph Builder
skills.description: Generate a large knowledge graph for SEO and AI-readable content from a business, site, product, or topic: typed entity nodes, relationship edges with reasons, the pillar pages worth publishing, an internal-linking plan, and JSON-LD scaffolding.

skills.title: Daily Check-in
skills.description: Drives an AI Employee's scheduled morning and midday check-ins: surface the one or two things most worth the supervisor's attention, offer the highest-value office work, and stay silent when there is nothing useful to say.

skills.title: Estimate
skills.description: Create, draft, price, and send an estimate or quote for a job: gather scope, pull rates, compute a total, and produce a clean estimate file.

skills.title: Invoice
skills.description: Create, draft, and send an invoice for completed work: pull the job detail, build the invoice, and produce a file ready to send.

skills.title: AMTECH Article Research Writer
skills.description: Research, plan, and draft information-gain, knowledge-graph-aware AMTECH articles from topics, notes, local documents, and external sources.

skills.title: AMTECH Article Publisher
skills.description: Publish supplied article copy into AMTECH's React article system, knowledge graph, OKF outputs, routes, and optional Supabase projection.
